description: Update radar:config channel semantics around one active radar at a time. Require device registration before get_config, target_data, or uploader_log handling. Reject a second active registered uploader while one is connected. Serve and push config only for the registered device_type, include device_type in config_updated payloads, and broadcast updates to the uploader only when they match the active device.
title: Route config channel by single active radar device
